segments.speaker: Ticket Staff
segments.text: Hi, welcome. Are you buying tickets today?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Yes. Do you offer a student discount?

segments.speaker: Ticket Staff
segments.text: We do. Do you have a student ID?

segments.speaker: Ticket Staff
segments.text: Great. General admission is discounted with that.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Perfect. I'm especially interested in architecture and spatial installations. Is there a gallery you'd recommend starting with?

segments.speaker: Ticket Staff
segments.text: You might like the contemporary wing, and the courtyard is worth seeing too.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Great. Is there an audio guide, or is everything on the app?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Got it. If I want to come back another day, is the ticket single-entry only?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Okay, then I'll take my time. Thanks for the guidance.
